data.body: DONE — Engine B shipped in src/rebar/grounding/{engine_b.py,detectors/} (commit 5c3d5a5c). All 6 ACs met: OpenGrep(semgrep) primary via SARIF→S1 parser, ast-grep secondary, scc/lizard metric; thin-envelope detectors (rebar_envelope in rule metadata) w/ built-in + project-local .rebar/detectors/ discovery, namespaced IDs, last-wins, mtime-cached process-local registry; loader pre-validates engine-faithfully (--validate) + quarantines invalid_detector WITHOUT aborting the scan (spike E1); self-declared applicability routing; concrete evidence-mapping (match & abstain share the shape); configurable metric thresholds; fail-open per backend. 15 unit tests (real engines) + mypy clean; 4 built-in detectors ship in the wheel (verified). CODE REVIEW (subagent): FIXED a BLOCKER (a non-relative paths glob crashed scan() → now quarantined) and a MAJOR (SARIF id suffix-ambiguity mis-attribution → most-specific wins); regression tests added. Provisional dimension vocab {web_frontend,has_iac,touches_auth,smell_generic} left for S5 to own. Closing.
